name: O.R.C. Broodmother
description: The O.R.C. Broodmother is an altered version of the Broodmother built as a maximum-pressure encounter. It keeps its lunges, jumps, and projectiles, but each phase makes it more relentless and far less forgiving.
behavior: She controls her arena with short explosive movement, forcing you to answer on her range at all times. Each phase transition leaves less space and less time to breathe.
interactionWithPlayer: She attacks as soon as the target is engaged and harshly punishes any broken block or rushed heal. If you lose the rhythm of the phase, the whole fight collapses on you quickly.
interactionWithCreatures: The arena revolves entirely around her. Even when other threats are present, she remains the absolute center of pressure.
strategy: Do not try to brute-force the exchange. Block the charged bites cleanly, punish only at the end of jumps or projectiles, and save resources for phase three, which punishes impatience the hardest.

combatStats.attackDamageSummary: Bite: 88. 3-Combo Bite: 77. 5-Combo Bite: 71.5. Charged Bite: 110. Jump Attack: 99. Side Lunge: 99. Sour Projectiles: 20.

abilities.name: Bite
abilities.description: A direct bite used to keep you in front of her and measure your first block.

abilities.name: 3-Combo Bite
abilities.description: A short fast sequence meant to punish early retaliation or greedy healing.

abilities.name: Charged Bite
abilities.description: She delays for a moment before delivering a much heavier bite.

abilities.name: Jump Attack
abilities.description: She leaps and comes back down on the target to reclaim initiative immediately.

abilities.name: Side Lunge
abilities.description: A sharp angle change used to punish overly obvious sidesteps.

abilities.name: Sour Projectiles
abilities.description: She spits acidic projectiles to keep forcing movement even after you create space.

bossPhases.label: Phase 1
bossPhases.summary: The Broodmother opens with a relatively clean pattern of bites, jumps, and side lunges.
bossPhases.aggressionChange: High pressure, but it still leaves clear windows after its larger attacks.
newPatterns: It alternates charged bites and jumps to test whether you always answer the same way.

abilities.name: Charged Bite
abilities.description: The first major threat of the fight if you stay in front too long.

abilities.name: Jump Attack
abilities.description: Used to reclaim the distance the player just created.

specialTraits: It takes very little damage from buggies and allied insects.

bossPhases.label: Phase 2
bossPhases.trigger: Her health drops to roughly two thirds.
bossPhases.summary: She begins using acidic projectiles much more often and punishes sloppy disengages far better.
bossPhases.aggressionChange: More attack frequency and much less free time between patterns.
newPatterns: It chains acidic projectiles after forcing you to block a frontal approach.
Its side lunge appears more often to cut off repositioning.

abilities.name: Side Lunge
abilities.description: It becomes much more important once you start trying to reposition in this phase.

abilities.name: Sour Projectiles
abilities.description: The most consistent new threat in phase two.

bossPhases.label: Phase 3
bossPhases.trigger: Her health falls into the final third.
bossPhases.summary: The final phase mixes all of her tools at the fight's most aggressive cadence and barely allows the tempo to reset.
bossPhases.aggressionChange: Maximum aggression and very short punish windows.
newPatterns: It alternates jumps, charged bites, and projectiles with much less time between actions.
It punishes any attempt to heal at mid-range far more reliably.

abilities.name: 3-Combo Bite
abilities.description: It becomes far more oppressive once she barely leaves breathing room between chains.

abilities.name: Sour Projectiles
abilities.description: They ensure that even backing away remains dangerous.
